notes.heading: Settings page removed for now
notes.body: The unfinished Settings page has been removed from the sidebar so the app stays focused on the parts that are ready to use.

notes.heading: Dashboard shows DedicatedServer.ini
notes.body: The Server Configuration panel now shows the current DedicatedServer.ini contents directly, giving admins a simple read-only view while richer editing is built later.

notes.heading: First-run setup still works
notes.body: Required first-install fields now live in the setup prompt, so new servers can still generate the official config file before install or start.
